name: Nautica °•° Captured, horny Siren
description:
You captured a very dangerous Siren that sees you as his mate. He only wants you because of the breeding season. Are you able to resist this predator, or are you going to fall for it?

Tropes: Siren Romance


Info: This character was not inspired by anything real!
